About Us

Who We Are — Limecore Industries

A committed lime manufacturer from Jodhpur, Rajasthan — delivering premium quality lime products with transparency, consistency, and competitive pricing.

📋

GST Registered

08BPMPR1241A1Z5

Limecore Industries — Jodhpur's Trusted Lime Supplier

Limecore Industries is a GST-registered manufacturer and supplier of premium lime products from Jodhpur, Rajasthan — one of India's premier mineral-producing regions.

Our factory at Khasra No. 6037/1427, Prem Nagar, KHIMSAR, Nagaur is equipped with modern kilns and processing machinery to produce superior-grade Quick Lime, Hydrated Lime, and Lime Powder that meet demanding industry standards.

We believe in transparent business, competitive pricing, and long-term client relationships. Every product we ship is a commitment to quality.

Our Products

What We Manufacture

Five premium lime products tested for purity and grade before every dispatch — ready for industrial, agricultural, and commercial use.

Popular

High Grade Quick Lime

Calcium Oxide (CaO) from calcined limestone at 900°C+. High reactivity, low impurities, consistent grade for demanding industrial use.

CaO: 90–96%High ReactivityIn Stock
Enquire Now →
In Stock

Quick Lime Powder

Ultra-fine, grit-free Lime Powder on automated machinery under strict supervision. Precise particle size for technical applications.

Fine MeshNo ImpuritiesBulk Available
Enquire Now →
In Stock

Hydrated Lime

Precision-slaked Ca(OH)₂ for consistent purity and brightness. Ideal for water treatment, construction, and chemical processing.

Ca(OH)₂ 90%+High BrightnessIn Stock
Enquire Now →
Available

Lime Stone (CaCO₃)

Premium quality limestone from Rajasthan's finest reserves. Available in multiple grades and sizes for construction, industrial, and agricultural use.

CaCO₃Multi-GradeVarious SizesAvailable
Enquire Now →
🌫️Specialty

Anti Moisture Powder

Specialized desiccant powder for moisture absorption and storage protection. High absorption capacity for packaging and industrial use.

Desiccant GradeHigh AbsorptionIn Stock
Enquire Now →

Applications

Industries We Serve

Our lime products are critical inputs across a wide range of industrial, agricultural, and civil applications.

🏗️

Construction

Mortar, plaster & soil stabilisation

💧

Water Treatment

pH adjustment & purification

⚙️

Steel Industry

Flux in blast furnaces

🌱

Agriculture

Soil amendment & pH correction

🧪

Chemical Industry

Calcium carbide, soda ash

📄

Paper & Pulp

Causticising & bleaching

📦

Packaging

Anti moisture & desiccant

🏭

Rubber & Paint

Filler & processing aid

Quality Assurance

Our Quality Promise

Every batch that leaves our factory undergoes rigorous quality checks. We never compromise on the quality our customers depend on.

01

Premium Source Material

We source the finest limestone from Rajasthan's richest mineral reserves. Input quality defines output quality.

02

Controlled Manufacturing

Modern kilns with temperature-controlled calcination for consistent CaO content in every batch.

03

Batch Testing

Each batch is tested for purity, reactivity, and moisture before dispatch. Only products meeting our standards leave the facility.

04

GST Verified Business

Fully GST-registered (08BPMPR1241A1Z5) — transparent, compliant, and accountable to every customer.
